data.executiveSummary: A critical incident was identified in the frontend-web service due to heightened CPU usage leading to potential performance degradation. The issue is compounded by increased latency, as captured in the tracing data.

rootCause.title: High CPU Usage
rootCause.description: The frontend-web service exhibited exceptionally high CPU usage at 95.92%, which is likely the primary cause of the observed performance issues and latency increase in the system.

data.impact: The high CPU usage on the frontend-web service resulted in performance degradation, as observed through the increased latency (p95 of 4.9 seconds) while the error rate remained at 0.00%. This could lead to a poorer user experience due to longer page load times.
recommendedActions: Investigate and optimize the code or process causing high CPU consumption in the frontend-web service.
Implement scaling strategies to better handle CPU-intensive workloads to prevent future incidents.
Monitor CPU usage trends to identify potential issues early and apply resource limits or alerts accordingly.
